evidence: RED: npm run test initially failed 6 App flow tests against Users Table. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6. Browser: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario user-home and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/qa-user-home-375x667.png show Able Band 홈, safety status, emergency button, scrollWidth=375 innerWidth=375. cleanup: killed QA Chrome/dev-server child; removed chrome profile; pre-existing 5173 listener left untouched.
capturedEvidence: RED: npm run test initially failed 6 App flow tests against Users Table. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6. Browser: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser-qa-log.json scenario user-home and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/qa-user-home-375x667.png show Able Band 홈, safety status, emergency button, scrollWidth=375 innerWidth=375. cleanup: killed QA Chrome/dev-server child; removed chrome profile; pre-existing 5173 listener left untouched.

evidence: RED: npm run test initially failed invalid login flow because login form was absent. GREEN: npm run test passed 6/6.
